// reporters: FqnDecoyReporterDecl.java.txt#Reporter.report
package leak.own;

// Adversarial: this file is itself leak.own and declares its own Reporter -
// the same-file-reject pin must fire before matching the declared tier-2
// target, even though the FQN call textually matches it.
class Reporter {
    static void report(Throwable cause) {}
}

class FqnDecoyTier2 {
    void m() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) { // want "JV001"
            leak.own.Reporter.report(e);
        }
    }

    void risky() throws Exception {}
}
